series_metadata.series_title: MT- Administrative Actions Taken from Allegations Unrelated to Licensee Exam.
series_metadata.series_description: These documents include denial of money transmitter applications, denial of change of control applications, suspensions, revocations, cease and desist actions, and civil penalties. Documents may also include Notices of Intent to take the administrative action, transcripts of hearings, reports, and recommendation of hearing officers, and Division orders.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper copy in operating area until imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked for quality and completeness, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain electronic files for five (5) years from date of termination of the administrative action, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
